name: The Unspeakable Oath
intro_text: The trail has led you to Arkham Asylum. One of the cult's inner circle — a man known only as 'The Harbinger' — is a patient here. Or so the records claim.
The warden has agreed to let you speak with the inmates, under supervision. But within an hour of your arrival, the lights go out.
In the darkness, someone whispers: 'The oath has been spoken. There is no way back.'
setup_instructions: Investigators begin in the Asylum Halls (03168).
Shuffle all remaining Asylum Halls locations and place face-down.
The Harbinger (03176) is set aside. He enters play when investigators reach the correct location.
Each investigator gains the Amnesia weakness card at scenario start.

R1.label: Resolution 1 — The Harbinger is found
text: You locate the Harbinger in the deepest cell of the asylum. What he tells you is difficult to hear — and impossible to forget.
The path to Carcosa is becoming clear. You wish it weren't.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators found the Harbinger. Each investigator earns 2 bonus XP.*

R2.label: Resolution 2 — You escaped before dawn
text: The asylum became something else in the night. You ran, and you did not look back.
The Harbinger's words follow you still.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators fled the asylum. Each investigator gains 1 mental trauma.*

defeat.label: Defeat — Committed
text: When dawn comes, the staff finds you in the corridors. There is no explanation for what you have experienced. No one would believe you anyway.
Record in the campaign log: *The investigators were defeated at The Unspeakable Oath. Each investigator gains 2 mental trauma.*
